---
title: 'Uniforms'
date: '2016-06-05T22:14:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Cornerstone Restaurants'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5578793817530267544'
blogger_filename: '/2016/06/uniforms.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Cornerstone Restaurants/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
http://ezcorporateclothing.com/default.asp</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
Uniforms:</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<br /></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/a77_adidas_golf_mens_climalite_colorblock_polo_sm/" href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/a77_adidas_golf_mens_climalite_colorblock_polo_sm/" rel="attachment wp-att-72" style="color: #00aadc;"><img alt="" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-72" data-mce-src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/a77-adidas-golf-mens-climalite-colorblock-polo-sm-50397451db62.jpg" height="175" src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/a77-adidas-golf-mens-climalite-colorblock-polo-sm-50397451db62.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: auto; max-width: 100%;" width="150" /></a><a data-mce-href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/a88_adidas_golf_mens_climalite_tourjersey_ss_polo_sm/" href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/a88_adidas_golf_mens_climalite_tourjersey_ss_polo_sm/" rel="attachment wp-att-74" style="color: #00aadc;"><img alt="" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-74" data-mce-src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/a88-adidas-golf-mens-climalite-tourjersey-ss-polo-sm-b615ff03df9e.jpg" height="175" src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/a88-adidas-golf-mens-climalite-tourjersey-ss-polo-sm-b615ff03df9e.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: auto; max-width: 100%;" width="150" /></a><a data-mce-href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/a86_adidas_golf_mens_climalite_tour_pique_ls_polosm/" href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/a86_adidas_golf_mens_climalite_tour_pique_ls_polosm/" rel="attachment wp-att-73" style="color: #00aadc;"><img alt="" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-73" data-mce-src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/a86-adidas-golf-mens-climalite-tour-pique-ls-polosm-e9b913acf41a.jpg" height="175" src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/a86-adidas-golf-mens-climalite-tour-pique-ls-polosm-e9b913acf41a.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: auto; max-width: 100%;" width="150" /></a><a data-mce-href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/1290c_ashworth_ladies_perf_wicking_piquepolo_sm/" href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/1290c_ashworth_ladies_perf_wicking_piquepolo_sm/" rel="attachment wp-att-71" style="color: #00aadc;"><img alt="" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-71" data-mce-src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/1290c-ashworth-ladies-perf-wicking-piquepolo-sm-a8902b12b166.jpg" height="175" src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/1290c-ashworth-ladies-perf-wicking-piquepolo-sm-a8902b12b166.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: auto; max-width: 100%;" width="150" /></a><a data-mce-href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/a89_adidas_golf_womens_climalite_tourjersey_ss_polo_sm/" href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/a89_adidas_golf_womens_climalite_tourjersey_ss_polo_sm/" rel="attachment wp-att-75" style="color: #00aadc;"><img alt="" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-75" data-mce-src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/a89-adidas-golf-womens-climalite-tourjersey-ss-polo-sm-4d9ad3eb90fe.jpg" height="175" src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/a89-adidas-golf-womens-climalite-tourjersey-ss-polo-sm-4d9ad3eb90fe.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: auto; max-width: 100%;" width="150" /></a><a data-mce-href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/d110w_devonjones_ladies_pimapique_ls_polo_sm/" href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/d110w_devonjones_ladies_pimapique_ls_polo_sm/" rel="attachment wp-att-76" style="color: #00aadc;"><img alt="" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-76" data-mce-src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/d110w-devonjones-ladies-pimapique-ls-polo-sm-1dc92fe26992.jpg" height="175" src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/d110w-devonjones-ladies-pimapique-ls-polo-sm-1dc92fe26992.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: auto; max-width: 100%;" width="150" /></a><a data-mce-href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/z0083_cat_md/" href="http://cornerstonerestaurants.wordpress.com/2012/11/29/70/z0083_cat_md/" rel="attachment wp-att-77" style="color: #00aadc;"><img alt="" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-77" data-mce-src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/z0083-cat-md-08a8aa5c8f68.jpg" height="175" src="/images/imported/cornerstonerestaurants-files-wordpress-com/z0083-cat-md-08a8aa5c8f68.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: auto; max-width: 100%;" width="150" /></a></div>
